title: CSA A23.3-14 Concrete Slab Design
description: Calculate reinforced concrete slab resistance as per CSA A23.3-14.

standard.description: Standard. Symbol: Standard. Standard used for calculations.

h_input.description: Thickness. Symbol: h. Units: mm. Overall member thickness.

f_pc_input.description: Concrete strength. Symbol: f_{pc}. Units: MPa. Concrete compressive strength (fpc).

rebar_input.description: Rebar. Symbol: Rebar. Size of rebar.

s_input.description: Spacing. Symbol: s. Units: mm. On center spacing between rebar.

f_y_input.description: Steel strength. Symbol: f_y. Units: MPa. Steel tensile strength.

cover_input.description: Cover. Symbol: cover. Units: mm. Clear concrete cover (exterior of rebar to slab face).

d_input.description: Lever arm. Symbol: d. Units: mm. Internal lever arm.

m_f_input.description: mf. Symbol: m_{f}. Units: kN. Distributed factored moment (kNm/m = kN).

v_f_input.description: vf. Symbol: v_{f}. Units: kN/m. Distributed factored shear.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
